title: geum calthifolium var. calthifolium
intro: Geum calthifolium var. calthifolium, also known as the wood avens or bearberry, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Geum calthifolium var. calthifolium include its ability to treat wounds, soothe digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
